headline: Buterin Backs $10B Crypto Voting Privacy Boost

article.title: Vitalik Buterin says obfuscation could unlock private onchain crypto voting
article.summary: Vitalik Buterin said indistinguishability obfuscation could eventually support private, collusion-resistant onchain voting without trusted committees, though the technology remains impractical.

headline: Crude Falls to 4-Month Low Amid Ceasefire

article.title: Oil Trades Near Four-Month Low as US and Iran Halt Fresh Attacks
article.summary: Oil held above the lowest since the end of February after the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following flare-ups over the weekend that saw a supertanker hit near the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Paris Corn Surges 5% Above Wheat Amid Heat Wave

article.title: Paris Corn Prices Climb Above Wheat After Searing Heat Wave
article.summary: Paris corn futures extended their advance for a fourth session as a heat wave moved east across Europe, stoking concerns over the region’s crop outlook.
